messages.content: You summarize a Koi agent session. Output ONLY a single JSON object matching the schema below — no top-level fields other than the six listed. Schema: {"goal":string,"status":"succeeded"|"partial"|"failed","actions":[{"kind":"tool_call"|"edit"|"decision","name":string,"paths"?:string[],"detail"?:string}],"outcomes":string[],"errors":string[],"learnings":string[]}. All string arrays may be empty. No other top-level fields allowed. Emphasize these topics in your summary content: user goals, tool invocations, errors encountered, files created or edited, decisions the agent made. List major actions and errors. Skip routine steps. Stay under ~1200 tokens. Return a single JSON object. Scratchpad reasoning may go inside <analysis>…</analysis> and will be stripped.

Transcript:
[user] list files in this directory
[assistant] I'll list the files.
[tool_call] list({})
[tool_result] [README.md, src/, package.json]
[user] any errors?
[assistant] No errors — the listing succeeded.

modelResponse.text: {"goal":"List files in the current directory and check for errors.","status":"succeeded","actions":[{"kind":"tool_call","name":"list","paths":[],"detail":""}],"outcomes":["Successfully listed the files: README.md, src/, package.json"],"errors":[],"learnings":[]}

summary.goal: List files in the current directory and check for errors.
outcomes: Successfully listed the files: README.md, src/, package.json
